# ona_environment_class (List Resource)

Lists Ona runner environment classes.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "ona_environment_class" "all" {
  provider         = ona
  include_resource = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `runner_ids` (List of String) Runner IDs to include.
